ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring site was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection to ensure the site is operational */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ozone_levels" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "site_id" TEXT /* Reference to the monitoring site */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "ddate" TEXT /* Date and time of the data record */,
  "ozone_8hr_daily_max" INTEGER /* Daily maximum 8-hour average ozone level */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the ozone level for the day */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "ozone_1hr_daily_max" INTEGER /* Daily maximum 1-hour average ozone level */,
  "pm2_5" INTEGER /* Daily maximum PM2.5 level */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature on the day of the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity on the day of the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed on the day of the measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction on the day of the measurement */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation on the day of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ozone_levels_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ozone_levels_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which data is recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year for data collection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year for data collection */,
  "data_collection_status" TEXT /* Status of data collection for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ozone level record being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the update occurred */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Person or system that performed the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the ozone level before the update */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the ozone level after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES ozone_levels ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for user contact */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "site_id" TEXT /* Reference to the monitoring site */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data integration */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data synchronization */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of external system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external system */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the external system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the external system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "site_id" TEXT /* Reference to the monitoring site */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being exported */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external system receiving the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was exported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data export process */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data export */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data in bytes */,
  "export_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES external_systems ("system_id")
)
